rdf:Description.dc:publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft In Bybliotheca Vaticana, Akademie der Wissenschaften in Hamburg

rdf:Description.dcterms:hasPart: Prayers for the transit of the soul
Prayer with imposition of the hands
ጸሎተ፡ ዕጣን፡ ዘያነብቦ፡ ቀሲስ፡ ጊዜ፡ በዊኦቱ፡ ቤተ፡ መቅደስ፡ ወይብል፡ ቀዊሞ፡ አፍአ፡ እመንጦላዕት።

Excerpts from No item: LIT2000Mazmur#Ps50 No item: LIT2000Mazmur#Ps4 No item: LIT2000Mazmur#Ps6 No item: LIT2000Mazmur#Ps8 No item: LIT2000Mazmur#Ps31 No item: LIT2000Mazmur#Ps24 No item: LIT2000Mazmur#Ps53 No item: LIT2000Mazmur#Ps60 No item: LIT2000Mazmur#Ps63 No item: LIT2000Mazmur#Ps65 No item: LIT2000Mazmur#Ps85 No item: LIT2000Mazmur#Ps101 No item: LIT2000Mazmur#Ps120 No item: LIT2000Mazmur#Ps129 No item: LIT2000Mazmur#Ps130 No item: LIT2000Mazmur#Ps140 No item: LIT2000Mazmur#Ps5 No item: LIT2000Mazmur#Ps19, The Prayer of Manasseh, Wangel za-Luqās 1, 45-55.
Prayer for the middle of the night (ዘመንፈቀ፡ ሌሊት፡)
Prayer for the middle of the night (ዘመንፈቀ፡ ሌሊት፡)
Prayer for the ninth hour of the night (ዘ፱፡ ሰዓት፡ ሌሊት፡)
Prayer for the second hour of the night (ጸሎት፡ በ፪፡ ሰዓተ፡ ሌሊት፨)
Prayer for the tenth hour (ዘ፲፡ ሰዓት፡)
Prayer for the sixth hour (በ፮፡ ሰዓት፡)
Prayer for the second hour of the night (ጸሎት፡ በ፪፡ ሰዓተ፡ ሌሊት፨)
Prayer for the third hour of the night (ጸሎት፡ ዘ፫፡ ሰዓተ፡ ሌሊት።)
